wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q829654 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Innovations for High Performance Microelectronics to de:IHP GmbH - Innovations for High Performance Microelectronics/Leibniz-Institut für innovative Mikroelektronik
IHP GmbH - Leibniz-Institut für innovative Mikroelektronik - an affected OSM element that may be improved

IHP GmbH - Innovations for High Performance Microelectronics/Leibniz-Institut für innovative Mikroelektronik

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
